description: Read-only WHOOP v2 data for MCP clients, with local SQLite cache and CSV/JSONL/Parquet exports.
name: io.github.AshwanthramKL/whoop-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Client ID from your WHOOP developer app (https://developer-dashboard.whoop.com/apps/create).
environmentVariables.name: WHOOP_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Client secret from your WHOOP developer app. Used for OAuth token refresh.
environmentVariables.name: WHOOP_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: OAuth redirect URI. Defaults to http://localhost:8000/callback — only change if you registered a different URI.
environmentVariables.name: WHOOP_REDIRECT_URI

environmentVariables.description: Log level (DEBUG / INFO / WARNING / ERROR). Default INFO.
environmentVariables.name: WHOOP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Path to the rotating log file. Set to empty string to disable file logging. Default ~/.whoop-mcp-server/logs/whoop-mcp.log.
environmentVariables.name: WHOOP_LOG_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Structured JSON logs (true) vs human-readable (false). Default true.
environmentVariables.name: WHOOP_LOG_JSON
